attributes.description: Cross-artifact execution evidence: (1) every Prefetch execution event, (2) Registry BAM/AppCompatCache/Amcache/UserAssist/MUICache findings, (3) Windows process-creation events (Sysmon 1, Security 4688) from EVTX. If a binary ran on this host, it should show up here at least once.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"_index : prefetch-* or (_index : registry-* and tags : registry_program_execution) or (_index : evtxlogs-* and winlog.event_id : (1 or 4688))"},"version":true}

attributes.title: Insider Threat: Execution Evidence (prefetch + registry + EVTX)
